content.en:
Ye Tian completed the first assessment of the inner domain and continued to move forward.

After walking some distance, the second assessment appeared.

Airplanes!!!

The Ancient Golden Tablet released a golden light that once again merged into Ye Tian's body, and a stream of information was transmitted to him, bringing him a second assessment.

"It's the Ancient Golden Inscription again!"

However, this time it is not one primeval inscription, but two primeval inscriptions.

He needs to comprehend all the two ancient golden texts within a specific time before he can pass the second assessment, so this second assessment is more difficult.

"Keep going!"

Ye Tian sat cross-legged and began to comprehend these two primeval golden texts.

With his comprehension and qualifications, it is definitely not a problem to understand these two ancient golden texts within the specified time.

Time passed slowly, and a few more primordial-level geniuses came in.

Obviously, these primordial-level geniuses used the long years to fight constantly, and finally won the primordial-level genius phantom, thus breaking into the inner domain.

It can be said that their strength is very average among the primeval-level geniuses, and if they are unlucky, they may not be able to enter.

......

this day.

The Heavenly Ancestor of the Dark Sword finally passed the first assessment, walked a distance, and began to break through the second assessment.

Ao Heng also passed the first assessment not long after.

It can be said that these top primeval geniuses are very terrifying in their own right, and they have realized that they have passed through a lot of primeval golden texts, and their understanding and perception of primeval golden scripts are not comparable to Ye Tian.

Therefore, it is still very easy for them to pass the first assessment.

"They all passed the first assessment so quickly, I can't even see the signs of enlightenment!"

Hayes Heavenly Ancestor was in a hurry.

It's not that he can't understand it, but it's the first time he's broken into the Inner Realm.

He was born at the end of the Ancient Era, and at that time he also encountered the birth of the Ancient Golden Tablet, but at that time, he had not yet become an Ancient Genius, he was just a Boundary-Breaking Genius, and he only broke into the Inner Domain.

Therefore, he didn't know much about the Taigu Jinwen, and it was the first time he had attained enlightenment, so the effect was very poor, far inferior to the Heavenly Ancestor of the Dark Sword.

"The goal this time is not big, just pass the first assessment!"

Hayes Heavenly Ancestor thought to himself.

Immediately, he glanced at Ye Tian, who was participating in the second assessment, and felt a serious sense of frustration in his heart.

Ye Tianming is also the first time to break into the inner domain, why is he so awesome?

And at this moment, Ye Tian was about to comprehend an ancient golden inscription again, and even the speed of comprehension was even faster than the first ancient golden inscription.

This is because he has a deeper understanding of the ancient gold inscriptions, so he naturally understands them more quickly.

Airplanes!

The second Taikoo Jin Wen has a thorough understanding, and this word represents water!

However, the second assessment requirement is to understand the two Taikoo Jinwen, so he still has to understand the third Taikoo Jinwen thoroughly before he can be considered to have passed the second assessment.

Another period of time passed, and Ye Tian finally understood the third Taigu Golden Text.

The meaning of this ancient inscription is soft!

Airplanes!!!!

The light of the Ancient Golden Tablet shrouded Ye Tian, which meant that Ye Tian had passed the second assessment.

Seeing this scene, the Immortal Sword Heavenly Ancestor's pupils shrank.

"So fast!"

In terms of time, Ye Tian's speed of comprehending the Taikoo Jinwen in the second assessment was much faster!

"Isn't this cultivator even more demonic than the Immortal Sword Heavenly Ancestor?" Ao Heng Heavenly Ancestor frowned, this kind of cultivation civilization of cultivators is indeed terrifying, if there are a large number of races in the Blood Transformation Realm, otherwise there is no way to suppress the cultivators.

In the territorial sea boundary, the strength of the cultivators is still weaker than that of the Blood Transformation Realm race.

However, the Blood Transformation Realm races were numerous and not united, so they couldn't help the cultivators.

Ye Tian passed the second assessment, which made these primeval-level geniuses attach great importance to it.

However, they didn't pay much attention to it, and soon continued to comprehend their own ancient inscriptions.

Ye Tian continued to move forward and walked a distance, getting closer to the Ancient Golden Monument.

At this time, the Ancient Golden Tablet once again emitted a golden light that merged into Ye Tian's body.

The third assessment has arrived!

"Ten Ancient Golden Texts!"

Ye Tian frowned slightly, this time it was much more difficult!

Of course, there was a lot more time given, otherwise, it would be very difficult for other top primordial-level geniuses to break through the third level.

"Continue to enlighten, the more you pass the assessment, the more benefits you will get!"

Ye Tian continued to meditate, starting from the first text of these ten primeval golden inscriptions.

Because he had comprehended the three primeval golden texts, the speed of his comprehension this time was much faster.

Time flies.

Ye Tian then comprehended one ancient golden text after another, and when he comprehended four ancient golden inscriptions in the third assessment, the Heavenly Ancestor of the Dark Sword also passed the second assessment and came to the third assessment.

After the Dark Sword Heavenly Ancestor, Ao Heng also passed the second assessment and came to the third assessment, followed by the top primordial-level geniuses such as the Moyu Heavenly Ancestor, the Black Wind Heavenly Ancestor, the Pupil Heart Heavenly Ancestor, and the Blood Sword Heavenly Ancestor.

Of course, there are also many primordial-level geniuses who are still in the first assessment, and the first assessment time is approaching.

"Finally understood!"

Hayes Tianzu Card comprehended the first primeval golden text and passed the first level.

Then, he came to the second assessment, and at this time he found that he needed to comprehend two primeval golden texts, and at a glance, he knew that he would definitely not pass the second assessment.

However, he still tried his best to comprehend these two primeval inscriptions.

Suddenly.

There was an ancient-level genius whose time had come, but he had not yet comprehended the first primeval golden text, and he had not passed the first assessment, and was directly excluded from the inner domain.

This is also the first primeval-level genius to be excluded!

Soon after, another primeval-level genius was ostracized and left.

"Jueguang Heavenly Ancestor, Dark Chen Heavenly Ancestor, they have been eliminated, my luck is still better!"

Hayes Heavenly Ancestor thought to himself.

After all, the strength of these two primeval-level geniuses was about the same as him, and his cultivation was also six blood transformation realms, so he was a little luckier and passed the first assessment.

And these two failed!

......

"Ten primeval golden inscriptions, nine have been comprehended, only the last primeval golden inscription remains, as long as you comprehend this primeval golden inscription, it is equivalent to passing the third assessment! Among this batch of primeval-level geniuses, there are only a handful of primeval-level geniuses who can pass the third assessment, and there will not be more than five!"

Ye Tian estimated.

After another period of time, he understood this last Taigu Jinwen thoroughly!

Airplanes!

Ye Tian's body was shrouded in the light of the ancient golden tablet, which meant that he had passed the third assessment.
